messages.content: # Here is how to fix “Error [track name] : TRACK NOT FOUND”

## Step 1
> Ensure you have Custom Shaders Patch installed by following <#1437178104861818992> 

## Step 2
> Delete the specified track following <#1457475437809631416>  then restart your PC.

## Step 3
> Once your PC has restarted, download the track again from https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1322224390741688371 

## Step 4
> Once downloaded, follow <#1457475437809631416>  to install the track.
